metadata.author: Abstract Security - Solutions Engineering
metadata.comments: Microsoft Sentinel Content Hub solution for Abstract Security. Deploys the connector tile, ASIM parser, analytics rule, and workbook, and registers the solution package. Playbooks + Copilot deploy separately. Validate with the Sentinel solution packaging tool before Content Hub submission.

properties.descriptionHtml: Abstract Security — the security data pipeline platform. Normalized, enriched, cost-reduced telemetry into Microsoft Sentinel, with a connector, ASIM parser, analytics, hunting queries, a workbook, SOAR playbooks, and a Security Copilot plugin/agent that call the Abstract API to close the loop.

connectorUiConfig.title: Abstract Security (Security Data Pipeline)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: **Abstract Security** delivers normalized, enriched, cost-reduced security telemetry into Microsoft Sentinel through the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API (Data Collection Rule). Use this connector to confirm delivery and jump to the deployment + setup steps.

sampleQueries.query:
[concat(parameters('customTableName'), '
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc')]

[concat(parameters('customTableName'), '
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize count() by tostring(AbstractEvent.product)')]

value:
[concat(parameters('customTableName'), '
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
| project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(3d)')]

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: Abstract Security tenant
customs.description: An Abstract Security account with a configured Azure Sentinel destination integration.

customs.name: Entra app registration
customs.description: An app registration whose service principal holds Monitoring Metrics Publisher on the Data Collection Rule (deployed by the Sentinel Destination template).

instructionSteps.title: 1. Deploy the Azure ingestion stack
instructionSteps.description: Deploy the **Azure Sentinel Destination** template (workspace + Sentinel + Data Collection Endpoint + custom table + Data Collection Rule + RBAC) from the Abstract Azure repo.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Create the Entra app
instructionSteps.description: Register an app + client secret and grant its service principal **Monitoring Metrics Publisher** on the DCR (the template does this when you pass the SP object id).

instructionSteps.title: 3. Configure the destination in Abstract
instructionSteps.description: In Abstract, add the **Azure Sentinel Destination** integration and paste the Client ID / Secret / Tenant ID, the **DCR Immutable ID**, the **DCE URL**, and the **Log Stream Name** (Custom-<table>) from the deployment outputs.

instructionSteps.title: 4. Route data and confirm
instructionSteps.description: Route a pipeline to the destination. Within minutes the graph above should turn green as events land in the custom table.

properties.displayName: Abstract Security - High or Critical event
properties.description: High/critical Abstract event; surfaces AbstractInsightId for the Verdict playbook.
properties.query:
AbstractEventLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| extend e = AbstractEvent
| extend AbstractSeverity=tolower(tostring(e.severity)), SrcIpAddr=coalesce(tostring(e.source_ipv4),tostring(e.source_address)), ActorUsername=coalesce(tostring(e.user_name),tostring(e.user_id)), AbstractInsightId=tostring(e.id), EventProduct=tostring(e.product)
| where AbstractSeverity in ('high','critical')
| project TimeGenerated, AbstractSeverity, EventProduct, SrcIpAddr, ActorUsername, AbstractInsightId

properties.serializedData:
{"version": "Notebook/1.0", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## Abstract Security — Pipeline Overview
Normalized, enriched, cost-reduced security telemetry delivered into Microsoft Sentinel by the Abstract data pipeline. Volume, coverage, and a pipeline-reduction estimate."}}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "AbstractEventLogs_CL
| summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart", "size": 0, "title": "Events ingested over time", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "timechart"}}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "AbstractEventLogs_CL
| summarize Events=count()", "size": 4, "title": "Total Abstract events (7d)", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "tiles"}}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "AbstractEventLogs_CL
| extend product=tostring(AbstractEvent.product)
| summarize Events=count() by product
| top 15 by Events desc", "size": 0, "title": "Events by product", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "barchart"}}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "AbstractEventLogs_CL
| extend severity=tostring(AbstractEvent.severity)
| summarize Events=count() by severity", "size": 0, "title": "Events by severity", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "piechart"}}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "// Pipeline reduction estimate: GB that landed in Sentinel.
AbstractEventLogs_CL
| extend acs_bytes = estimate_data_size(AbstractEvent)
| summarize Events=count(), SentinelGB=round(sum(acs_bytes)/1024.0/1024/1024,3)", "size": 0, "title": "Ingested volume (GB) — pair with Abstract source volume for $ saved", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "visualization": "table"}}], "styleSettings": {}, "$schema": "https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
